    <profile>
      <id>active</id>
      <repositories>
        <repository>
          <url>https://active.example.test/maven</url>
        </repository>
      </repositories>
    </profile>

      <id>inactive</id>
      <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
          <url>https://inactive-plugins.example.test/maven</url>

    </profile>
  </profiles>

  </activeProfiles>
</settings>
